notes: Core mechanics are present but the maze layout is inconsistent/broken (spaces in MAZE_STR cause walkable gaps in walls), ghost AI is rudimentary, pac-man movement feels imprecise due to loose tile-snapping, and the ghost house/release logic has issues that can cause ghosts to behave erratically.

An incredibly impressive and accurate implementation of Pac-Man, featuring authentic ghost AI, cornering mechanics, and complete game loops, with only minor visual differences from the arcade original.

A solid but not authentic Pac-Man clone with working movement, pellets, power pellets, ghosts, lives, levels, and pause, but ghost AI/release logic and visuals are simplified and not fully faithful to the original.
